task:
In Brave, visit and bookmark each of these three Wikipedia pages in order, bookmarking each one before moving on:
1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Computer_science
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mathematics
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Physics

Then end up with exactly two tabs open: one showing https://httpbin.org/get and one showing https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Computer_science. All three Wikipedia bookmarks must exist and all three Wikipedia URLs must appear in browsing history.

verification.description: Tab with Computer_science Wikipedia page is open
Mathematics Wikipedia page was visited in history
Physics Wikipedia page was visited in history
